np

there's a hit and miss but here's goes nothing. I can't even retain much what i have been through 

||In Sanga Deepdive, the keeper took her role as her maid from childhood. Keeper task is to convince Sanga to return to their hometown. 

They found her in a city where art thrive since Sanga is an aspiring sculpture under the tutelage of August a renowned sculpture. She is tasked to create a piece for his grand exhibition. The scene where the keeper wake up and already become a model for her statue. She also confirmed the identity of her maid

Later the sculpture was complete and was praised by Mr August but Sanga was not satisfied and destroyed the statue. To Mr August anger, he reminds Sanga that she's been under his care and would not afraid to removes her if she fails to complete her sculpture in time. In which Sanga challenge him.

The scene later change to keeper  stalking her around the city because they heard rumours that Sanga did something's dubious behind their back. They follow her until she confront them at the grave yard where she presenting a dslime as the greatest sculpting material and also her awakener form. To which keeper shocked. Later they took a stroll at the beach and it reminds them of their past. Sanga also lament that she needs to be under the sea to produce it. She made a promise to return home with her maid after the exhibition.||

|| Timeskip, it was almost the day of exhibition, August was found to plagiarized the work of his students, bribery and such. Sanga also was no where in sight. On the day of the exhibition, people was excited to see Sanga creation. When it was revealed, the sculpture looks like petrified Sanga. Keeper touches her sculpture and it fills the vision of them seeing the underwater. August later push the keeper away putting them off the trance, vows to destroy the sculpture but only to be taken away by the security figure. By nightfall, the keeper lament whether Sanga was really dead when she looks at the sculpture. 

She later noticed that the sculpture looking at a certain direction where Sanga told her to be there after the exhibition. She later make haste and try to find Sanga. It was the same location of them when they were younger, the keeper keep on searching untill they passed out, where Sanga seems to approach them. Sanga later reveal that she wanted to take her maid home back to the sea where multiple familiar statue drifting in the sea water. She also told that people who sees her statue are already dead. 

The keeper piece out information together , they were shocked and terrified by the revelation. Sanga love the expression made by them and also revealed that she already knew the keeper is posing as her maid. Later she renounce that she and her maid will be together forever under the sea||
